prerequisites: A Basecamp 3 account with access to the projects and data you want to sync.
An OAuth integration registered at the 37signals integrations dashboard (launchpad.37signals.com/integrations) to obtain a client_id and client_secret. Registration requires a redirect URI.
A refresh token obtained by completing the OAuth 2.0 web server authorization flow (maps to the client_refresh_token_2 field).
Your Basecamp account_id, which is embedded in every API request URL (https://3.basecampapi.com/{account_id}/).
A start_date marking the earliest point from which to begin syncing data.

authMethods.name: OAuth 2.0 (refresh token)
authMethods.summary: Basecamp 3 requires OAuth 2.0 for all API access; basic authentication is not supported. Register an integration to get a client_id and client_secret, complete the web_server authorization flow at https://launchpad.37signals.com/authorization/new, and exchange the returned verification code at https://launchpad.37signals.com/authorization/token for an access token plus a refresh token. The connector authenticates with client_id, client_secret, and client_refresh_token_2, refreshing the short-lived access token via a POST to the token endpoint with type=refresh.

setupSteps.title: Register a Basecamp OAuth integration
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the 37signals integrations dashboard at https://launchpad.37signals.com/integrations and create a new application. Provide a redirect URI. After registration you receive a client_id and client_secret; supply these as the connector client_id and client_secret fields.

setupSteps.title: Authorize and obtain a refresh token
setupSteps.body: Direct a user to https://launchpad.37signals.com/authorization/new with type=web_server, client_id, and redirect_uri. After the user grants access, Basecamp redirects back with a verification code. Exchange it via POST to https://launchpad.37signals.com/authorization/token (type=web_server, client_id, client_secret, redirect_uri, code) to receive an access token and a refresh token. Provide the refresh token as client_refresh_token_2.

setupSteps.title: Find your account ID
setupSteps.body: Call https://launchpad.37signals.com/authorization.json with your access token to view the accounts available to your credentials, then take the numeric account id. This is the value used in the API base URL https://3.basecampapi.com/{account_id}/. Enter it as the connector account_id.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Provide start_date to define the earliest date from which the connector begins syncing records.

sources.title: Basecamp 3 API (base URL, account ID, authentication, rate limiting)
